sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.81 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: (Well-known problem). Is the conjugacy problem in the braid group$B_n$in the class NP (that is, decidable in nondeterministic polynomial time with respect to the maximum of the lengths$|u|$,$|v|$, where$u, v$are the input braid words)? A~stronger question: given two conjugate elements of$B_n$represented by braid words of lengths$m$, is there a conjugator whose length is bounded by a polynomial fun...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
